basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Project Associate, Technical Assistant, Field Worker

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Computer Science and Engineering, remote sensing or related field; B.Tech or M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering or related field; Bachelor degree in agriculture science or computer science; Bachelor degree in any discipline.
qualification.details: Research Associate: PhD in Computer Science and Engineering, remote sensing or related field from a recognised university. Project Associate/JRF: B.Tech or M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering or related field from a recognised university. Technical Assistant: Bachelor degree in agriculture science or computer science from a recognized university. Field Worker: Bachelor degree in any discipline from a recognized university.

salary_details.project associate/jrf: Rs 37,000 + HRA if GATE or NET qualification, else Rs 30,000 + HRA

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Ropar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Ropar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIT Ropar various posts recruitment is 20th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the positions of Research Associate, Project Associate, Technical Assistant, and Field Worker in the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate position, candidates must hold a PhD in Computer Science and Engineering, remote sensing, or a related field from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate/JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate/JRF post is Rs 37,000 + HRA if the candidate has GATE or NET qualification, otherwise it is Rs 30,000 + HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an online or offline interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for the posts announced by IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits for the posts. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the online mode only. Ensure you complete the application process before the closing date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) is located in Ropar, Punjab, with the pincode 140001.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for IIT Ropar Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or by visiting the official website of IIT Ropar.
